items.title: Raise ‘Pro-Poor’ Tobacco Taxes For ‘Triple-Win Policy’, Say Anti-Smoking Advocates
items.summary: Anti-tobacco groups want a big one-off hike in cigarette excise duty, followed by automatic annual tax increases. Tobacco taxes are a "pro-poor" health protection measure and a "triple-win policy" for public health, health inequity, and revenue generation. The post Raise ‘Pro-Poor’ Tobacco Taxes For ‘Triple-Win Policy’, Say Anti-Smoking Advocates appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Fifty Patients, Two Doctors: Unsafe Overcrowding Crisis in HRPB Medical Wards — Medical Officer
items.summary: Amid bed shortages in HRPB's medical wards, patients are being placed as "lodgers" in other wards. One medical team of 2 internal medicine MOs and 1-2 HOs is expected to manage 50+ patients across multiple wards in multiple locations, with multiple risks. The post Fifty Patients, Two Doctors: Unsafe Overcrowding Crisis in HRPB Medical Wards — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: GP-Led Care Central To Ageing Nation Strategy — MMA
items.summary: Our seniors deserve more than fragmented solutions. They deserve a system designed around their realities, one that brings care closer to where they live. The post GP-Led Care Central To Ageing Nation Strategy — MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Ampang Hospital’s Flooded Operating Theatre Resuming Operations Tomorrow
items.summary: When it rains, it pours — literally in the case of Ampang Hospital with a flooded OT, while its IT system has been down for nearly a week. The OT will resume operations tomorrow as the problem has been fixed. But the eHIS system is still being worked on. The post Ampang Hospital’s Flooded Operating Theatre Resuming Operations Tomorrow appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Nationalism In Malaysia’s Health Service — Specialist
items.summary: I had to beg for almost 2 years just to obtain an office as the neurosurgery HOD. Over the next 5 years, no additional furniture was provided. If the “atasan” were truly nationalistic, wouldn't they equip their workers with basic necessities to function? The post Nationalism In Malaysia’s Health Service — Specialist appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: ‘Code Blue’ Crisis Demands Formation Of Health Service Commission: Ex-Senator
items.summary: Ex-Senator Dr RA Lingeshwaran says a "code blue" crisis of health worker shortages demands the establishment of a Health Service Commission to manage human resources and budgeting for the health workforce, and to reduce dependence on the constrained JPA. The post ‘Code Blue’ Crisis Demands Formation Of Health Service Commission: Ex-Senator appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Serdang Hospital Begins Outsourcing Outpatient Angiograms To Private
items.summary: Sultan Idris Shah Serdang Hospital tells other government hospitals to stop referring outpatient angiograms to it, but to private hospitals instead under the HSOP outsourcing programme, reportedly because the MOH’s national heart centre is too overwhelmed. The post Serdang Hospital Begins Outsourcing Outpatient Angiograms To Private appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: MND Malaysia Strengthens Community Bonds At Family Gathering 2026
items.summary: A total of 48 participants, including 12 MND warriors and their families, took part in the gathering. The post MND Malaysia Strengthens Community Bonds At Family Gathering 2026 appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Avoid Zero Sum Game Debate Between Doctors And Corporate Schemes — Dr Raymond Choy
items.summary: Patients should not feel that their care is compromised by cost considerations, nor should they be exposed to unnecessary treatments driven by system inefficiencies. Achieving this balance requires trust. The post Avoid Zero Sum Game Debate Between Doctors And Corporate Schemes — Dr Raymond Choy appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: After DG’s Admission, Hartal Demands Health Service Commission
items.summary: In endorsing DG Mahathar's rare acknowledgment of a fragmented health workforce pipeline, Hartal Doktor Kontrak wants a Health Service Commission to streamline the whole process, decentralise health service employment from JPA, and ensure permanent posts. The post After DG’s Admission, Hartal Demands Health Service Commission appeared first on CodeBlue .
